message:
chore: unexport ~29 dead symbols in internal/storage/sqlite

Unexport package-internal symbols with no external callers:
- errors: IsConflict, IsCycle, IsNotFound
- util: IsUniqueConstraintError (removed duplicate), IsForeignKeyConstraintError, IsBusyError
- external_deps: CheckExternalDep, CheckExternalDeps, GetUnsatisfiedExternalDeps, ExternalDepStatus
- collision: CollisionResult, CollisionDetail, RenameDetail
- ids: GetAdaptiveIDLength, IsHierarchicalID, ValidateIssueIDPrefix, GenerateBatchIssueIDs, EnsureIDs
- freshness: FreshnessChecker, NewFreshnessChecker
- migration_invariants: MigrationInvariant, CleanOrphanedRefs
- migrations: MigrationInfo
- schema_probe: SchemaProbeResult, ErrSchemaIncompatible
- ready: ExcludeIDPatternsConfigKey, DefaultExcludeIDPatterns
- config: CustomStatusConfigKey, CustomTypeConfigKey

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
